summary: The patient’s long-standing episodes of cyclic pelvic/back pain, painful bowel movements, and infertility are all characteristic signs of endometriosis. Endometrial implants affecting nearby organs—such as those involving the rectovaginal septum—are a known cause of both GI symptoms and reproductive dysfunction.
